dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4455 IS: Public Lands Integrity Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Bennet (for himself, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Merkley, and Mr. Heinrich) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Budget

form.official-title: To amend section 313 of the Congressional Budget Act of 1974 to designate provisions resulting in the sale, disposal, or transfer of Federal lands as extraneous under the Byrd Rule.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Public Lands Integrity Act.

section.header: Provisions resulting in the sale, disposal, or transfer of Federal lands designated as extraneous under the Byrd Rule
section.text: Section 313(b)(1) of the Congressional Budget Act of 1974 (2 U.S.C. 644(b)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking and (F) and inserting (F); and
by inserting ; and (G) a provision that results in the sale, disposal, or transfer of Federal lands shall be considered extraneous before the period at the end.
